title: Wrong output when converting Verilog to AIG

features.name: combinational always block with conflicting if assignments
features.description: Code should include an always @(*) block with a case statement containing multiple if-statements that assign to the same signal under mutually exclusive conditions

features.name: sequential always block with tautological condition in case
features.description: Code should include a sequential always @(posedge clk) block with a case statement where one branch has a tautological condition (!in || in)
